title: MC but its a RPG
description: This modpack expands and refines the normal Minecraft playthru.
body:
This modpack is recommended with friends
----------------------------------------------------------------------------
This modpack expands and refines vanilla minecraft with several game changing mods to add and clean the vanilla game's messy progression. Adding stuff like a Skill tree, custom weapons and armor, and revamping boss fights! however, there are more laid-back features like advanced stargazing and small new mobs for you to enjoy. And if neither of those are your cup of tea, then there are several changes to vanilla exploration, like new and updated structures and new biomes for all 3 dimensions!
